svg.text: One pipeline, two lanes, one fenced judge. Every verdict is arithmetic; the trust reading is graded but still a count.

svg.text: The test that keeps it honest

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Delete the judge and the trust-model grouping, and the verdict must come out identical — you would just have 120 unclustered findings

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: instead of a readable tree. If removing the soft layer changes any HALT / PROCEED / CANNOT-ATTEST, it was deciding, not proposing.

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Gate is binary and deterministic. Trust reading is graded and deterministic. The judge proposes and is measured, and never gates.
